videos.description:
DVD COMPLETO STUDIO BAR – VOL. 01, VOL. 02 E VOL. 03 | MODÃO, SERTANEJO RAIZ, RESENHA E POUT POURRI 

O Studio Bar apresenta o DVD completo com os três volumes reunidos em um único vídeo: Vol. 01, Vol. 02 e Vol. 03.
Um espetáculo de modão, sertanejo, pout pourri sertanejo, modão raiz, sertanejo universitário, músicas ao vivo e aquela resenha de bar que só o Studio Bar sabe entregar. 

Aqui você encontra interpretações únicas de grandes artistas como Bruno & Marrone, Fred & Fabrício, Diego & Victor Hugo, Luan Pereira, Léo & Raphael, Zé Ricardo & Thiago e muito mais.
Se você ama sertanejo raiz, modão romântico, sofrência, clássicos sertanejos, barzinho ao vivo e clima de sextou, esse vídeo é pra você!

videos.title: Ultimate 80s Classics – Timeless Icons in One Playlist
videos.description:
🔥 Timeless 80s Anthems That Never Fade
Turn up the volume and dive into a sonic time capsule packed with the most iconic 80s tracks. From the electric pop of Madonna to the anthemic power of Queen and Michael Jackson, this playlist brings together unforgettable hooks, legendary vocals, and pure nostalgia. Perfect for dance floors, road trips, or just reminiscing about the golden decade of music. Feel the rhythm, live the legacy, and celebrate the artists who shaped a generation.

🎯 Tracklist:
00:00 Toto - Africa
Epic vocals and irresistible melody. A global anthem of the 80s.

04:54 Madonna - La Isla Bonita
Dreamy Latin-pop fused with synth elegance.

08:55 Lionel Richie - All Night Long (All Night)
Feel-good vibes in a Caribbean-influenced dance classic.

15:14 Men at Work - Down Under
Australian rock meets quirky storytelling.

18:53 Tears for Fears - Everybody Wants To Rule The World
Melodic introspection meets new wave mastery.

23:03 Michael Jackson - The Way You Make Me Feel
Groove-driven classic that defined late-80s MJ.

27:59 Modern Talking - Brother Louie
Euro disco at its peak—catchy and unforgettable.

31:38 Madonna - Like a Prayer
Soulful vocals with gospel and pop fusion.

37:19 INXS - Need You Tonight
Slick funk-rock with seductive vocals.

40:19 Queen - Another One Bites The Dust (Remastered 2011)
Iconic bassline that grooves like no other.

43:52 Michael Jackson - Bad - 2012 Remaster
Attitude and rhythm packed into one explosive track.

47:58 Rod Stewart - Da Ya Think I'm Sexy?
Disco swagger from a rock legend.

53:28 Frankie Goes to Hollywood - Relax
Provocative, bold, and sonically addictive.

57:25 The Human League - Don't You Want Me
A synthpop classic that defines the decade.

01:01:20 Ray Parker, Jr. - Ghostbusters
Playful, funky, and instantly recognizable.

01:05:24 Blondie - Heart Of Glass
Disco meets punk with shimmering results.

01:09:35 Modern Talking - You're My Heart, You're My Soul
Romantic and catchy Euro disco anthem.

01:15:04 Michael Jackson - Thriller
Cinematic and iconic — a pop culture milestone.

01:21:00 Journey - Don't Stop Believin'
An eternal stadium rock anthem.

01:25:07 Guns N' Roses - Sweet Child O' Mine
Powerful vocals and one of rock’s most iconic riffs.

01:31:02 Queen - A Kind Of Magic (Remastered 2011)
Theatrical rock with dazzling production.

01:35:23 Depeche Mode - Personal Jesus
Dark synth groove with spiritual overtones.

01:40:18 Billy Idol - Mony Mony
Rebellious energy meets dancefloor attitude.

01:45:18 Michael Jackson - Beat It
Explosive pop-rock with guitar firepower.

01:49:35 Madonna - Material Girl
A glittery and playful 80s pop declaration.

01:53:34 The Hollies - Long Cool Woman (In a Black Dress)
Bluesy swagger and sharp riffs.

01:56:52 Lipps Inc. - Designer Music
Funky, flashy, and full of disco flair.

02:02:33 Rod Stewart - Young Turks (2008 Remaster)
A tale of young love wrapped in synth-pop sheen.

02:07:34 Queen - Crazy Little Thing Called Love
Retro rockabilly with Queen’s signature twist.

02:10:16 Wham! - Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go
Bright, bouncy, and instantly danceable.

02:14:06 Dire Straits - Walk Of Life
Feel-good anthem with twangy guitars.

02:18:13 Billy Idol - Dancing With Myself
A punk-disco crossover with self-empowered vibes.

02:24:11 The Cure - Boys Don't Cry
Bittersweet and timeless post-punk gem.

02:26:47 The Pointer Sisters - I'm So Excited
Pure energy and infectious joy.

02:30:36 Culture Club - Karma Chameleon (Remastered 2002)
Colorful pop classic with reggae undertones.

02:34:47 The B-52's - Rock Lobster
Zany, surreal, and danceable art-rock.

02:41:35 Nena - 99 Luftballons
Anti-war message wrapped in synth-pop brilliance.

02:45:25 Queen - Bohemian Rhapsody (Remastered 2011)
Operatic rock masterpiece—no intro needed.
